description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, surrounded by a paved area and a row of evenly spaced trees along the front and one side. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a central entryway, accessed by a short set of steps. The rear of the property includes a small pool and a landscaped garden area, visible from the side and back views. The exterior walls are a light gray or off-white color, giving the house a modern and clean appearance. The property is bordered by a low curb or platform, separating it from the surrounding environment. The overall design is minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with a light facade, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and rows of trees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and a row of trees lining the front curb.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the paved driveway, trees along the side, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the garden, pool, and the back facade with additional windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the driveway, trees, and a clear view of the pool and backyard layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and flanked by trees
